change_summary.summary: Shortened the Discussion boundary paragraph and the Limitations material-and-embodied paragraph to remove visible page-9 right-column split clusters while preserving all evidence bounds, dataset counts, scene counts, episode counts, and non-speedup limitations.

observations: The final page-9 right-column crop removes the targeted Discussion and Limitations split cluster around evidence, matrix, effect, fixtures, InternNav, local, InteriorAgent, and manipulation.
The accepted Discussion wording still keeps the method-as-boundary message and the 99-episode KuJiaLe sanity-check boundary.
The accepted Limitations wording still keeps the 15-pair clean pool, 30-pair stress set, 30 GRScenes samples, three KuJiaLe scenes, 99 paired episodes, and non-speedup boundary.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.
